title: henckelia calcarea
intro: Henckelia calcarea, also known as Indian gentian or gentian, is a plant species that belongs to the gentian family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve digestive issues such as indigestion and bloating. The plant contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body, contributing to various health benefits such as improved immune function and reduced risk of chronic diseases. Henckelia calcarea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tinctures, and teas, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
